# Louis Bohan
> ERP partnerships, full-stack applications, and AI tooling.

Currently leading channel growth at Odoo. Scaled North American partner program 5x to 500+ accounts. Build full-stack apps with Next.js, TypeScript, and modern AI APIs.

## Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/louisbohan
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/louisbohan
- Email: louis@louisbohan.com

## Projects
- **Brand Availability Agent** — Scans 50+ platforms for brand name availability. DNS verification, AI strategist analysis. https://github.com/louisbohan/brand-availability-agent
- **Prompt Router** — Intent-aware LLM routing proxy. Auto-selects Claude, DeepSeek, or GPT per request. https://github.com/louisbohan/prompt-router
- **Kitchen Remodel Estimator** — Interactive cost estimator for Bay Area contractors. https://github.com/louisbohan/kitchen-remodel-estimator

## Roles
- Channel & Partnership Lead at Odoo
- Full-Stack Builder (Next.js, TypeScript, TailwindCSS)
- AI Tooling & Automation (Claude, OpenAI, OpenClaw)
- Revenue-driven development (products with MRR)

## Bio
I build software that sells. ERP partnerships, full-stack apps, and AI-powered tools — from concept to deployment to revenue. I sit at the intersection of enterprise software sales and rapid AI-driven development.
